The '''MC90 Star Cruiser''' was a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] class designed by the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="DESB" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Mc90sideview.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Sideview of the [[Defiance (MC90 Star Cruiser)|''Defiance'']].]]
Produced in the [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari Shipyards]],<ref name="TJAS" /> the MC90 was the first [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] designed specifically as a warship. Its focus on heavy weapons and large hangars showed a realistic assessment of the firepower required to challenge [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]].<ref name="DESB" /> The MC90 was the most powerful warship built for the New Republic before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

Controls and displays onboard the ship were designed, for the first time on a Mon Calamari Cruiser, for compatibility with most major species, allowing for officers other than Mon Calamari to pilot the vessels.<ref name="DESB" /> The command center was a clear bubble in the center of the ship, giving the bridge officers a vision of the area below as well as above. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] was not pleased with the choice of constructing the bridge this way; he argued that it was too much of a weak spot that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces could exploit.<ref name="TNR">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:MC90BTS.jpg|thumb|left|200px|At least one [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] design seems to have served as basis for the MC90.<ref name="Star Wars Sourcebook">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref> ]]
The MC90 was developed early in New Republic history as its plans were approved six months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. However, due to the poor New Republic resources at that time, the ambitious MC90 project was delayed to foster development and production of the [[MC80B Star Cruiser]].<ref name="FF96">{{FactFile|96|MON 1-2|''Mon Remonda''}}</ref>

The MC90 represented a number of firsts that highlight the shifting military strategy of the New Republic that would eventually culminate in the [[New Class Modernization Program|New Class]] program. The first MC90, [[Defiance (MC90 Star Cruiser)|''Defiance'']], was completed shortly before the [[Battle of Calamari]].<ref name="DESB" />

The MC90 became one of the most powerful warships in the arsenal of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]], often serving as a flagship for fleets and task forces.<ref name="DESB" /> Due to the tremendous value of the vessels, most were stationed in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

These powerful warships remained the pinnacle of Mon Calamari ship building until the advent of the [[Mediator-class battle cruiser|''Mediator''-class battle cruiser]].<ref name="VP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref> Older vessels, like the ''[[Galactic Voyager]]'', were kept in reserve and upgraded during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], but served more as token symbols than heavy duty warships.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

[[File:Defiance-DarkEmpire2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|An MC90 Star Cruiser, the ''Defiance''.]]
Despite the predominance of newer Mon Calamari-built warships in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], such as the [[Mon Calamari heavy carrier]] and ''Mediator''-class battle cruiser, the MC90 was still considered to be a powerful frontline combat starship. This was evident in the usage of the ''[[Galactic Voyager]]'' as the flagship of Alliance [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Cha Niathal]].<ref name="E" />
